---
date: "2021-06-30T00:00:00+01:00"
draft: false
menu:
  log:
    parent: Encontros
    weight: 15
title: Encontro Síncrono 8
weight: 17
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
output: 
  blogdown::html_page:
    toc: true
    css: "/assets/css/custom.css"
type: docs
---


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::include_url('https://places-research.github.io/aula07_log/', height = "400px")
```

[LINK](https://places-research.github.io/aula07_log/)
